TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kiyumi, title = kiyumi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kiyumi} }

S.FORM: alang kiyumi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,212 buwan, 3,340 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. maki alang Kungkung . s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 670 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 2,670 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kiyumi hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na kiyumi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na kiyumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na kiyumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na kiyumi hya' ga Kungkung. tay mkyahu' na kiyumi hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang kiyumi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,212 buwan, 3,340 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. maki alang Kungkung . s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 670 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 2,670 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kiyumi hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na kiyumi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na kiyumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na kiyumi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na kiyumi hya' ga Kungkung. tay mkyahu' na kiyumi hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kijumi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. maki alaŋ kuŋkuŋ . s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa kuŋkuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kijumi ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
